title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Xpressbees - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Xpressbees - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Xpressbees invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Agra location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Xpressbees:
Xpressbees is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees!
